title: OPERATIONAL AND DISPATCHING CONTROL OF THE PRODUCTION PROCESS OF THE OIL EXTRACTION ENTERPRISE
author: Firnafas Yusupov
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Under the conditions of the probabilistic nature of the technological process, as well as the presence of uncertainty in the production of an oil extraction enterprise, it is impossible to ensure a sufficiently high rhythm of production and, consequently, its efficiency without automated process control systems. Based on the results of the inspection of the oil extraction enterprise as an object of automated control, a block diagram of the centralized control system for the oil extraction enterprise is proposed.
steps_raw: Under the conditions of the probabilistic nature of the technological process, as well as the presence of uncertainty in the production of an oil extraction enterprise, it is impossible to ensure a sufficiently high rhythm of production and, consequently, its efficiency without automated process control systems. Based on the results of the inspection of the oil extraction enterprise as an object of automated control, a block diagram of the centralized control system for the oil extraction enterprise is proposed.
